description: Extract 16 critical fields from Health Insurance Claims for impactful demo showcasing complete claims adjudication automation

patientName.description: Patient or claimant full legal name
patientName.demo_impact: Critical for claim matching and identity verification against policy

patientNRIC.demo_impact: Links claim to specific policy and enables fraud prevention

invoiceIssuedOrgName.description: Hospital, clinic, or medical provider name
invoiceIssuedOrgName.demo_impact: Validates in-network provider status and negotiated rates

doctorName.description: Attending physician or treating doctor name
doctorName.demo_impact: Verifies medical credentials and prevents billing fraud

billNo.description: Invoice or bill reference number for tracking
billNo.demo_impact: Unique identifier for claim matching and duplicate prevention

billDate.description: Date invoice was issued by provider
billDate.demo_impact: Validates claim within submission timeframe (typically 90 days)

visitDate.description: Date of hospital admission or medical visit
visitDate.demo_impact: Determines coverage period and validates claim timeliness

dischargeDate.description: Date patient was discharged from hospital
dischargeDate.demo_impact: Calculates length of stay for hospitalization benefits

diagnosis.description: Medical diagnosis or clinical condition requiring treatment
diagnosis.demo_impact: Validates treatment is covered under policy exclusions/inclusions

treatmentDescription.description: Summary of treatments, procedures, and services provided
treatmentDescription.demo_impact: Ensures services are medically necessary and policy-covered

totalBillAmount.description: Total charges before subsidies and deductions (SGD)
totalBillAmount.demo_impact: Gross amount used for benefit limit calculation

governmentSubsidy.description: Government subsidy or Pioneer/Merdeka assistance amount (SGD)
governmentSubsidy.demo_impact: Other payer responsibility - reduces insurer liability

medisavePayable.description: Amount paid from CPF MediSave account (SGD)
medisavePayable.demo_impact: Integrated benefit coordination - key SGD insurance feature

insurerPayable.description: Amount the insurance company must pay (SGD)
insurerPayable.demo_impact: Directly impacts claims processing decision and payout

patientPayable.demo_impact: Validates patient responsibility calculation against policy terms

gstAmount.description: 9% Goods and Services Tax on medical charges (SGD)
gstAmount.demo_impact: Complex calculation showing OCR and mathematical accuracy
